title: CI:DOCS CI: Reenable the ci-colon-doc skips
body:
Looks like we lost the ability to skip CI tests by using
the magic CI:DOCS string. Try to add that back.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
It doesn't seem to be working, though???
The cirrus regex parsing is broken. Filed https://github.com/cirruslabs/cirrus-ci-docs/issues/715

Okay, it works now. I had to re-push with `.*` in the pattern. 

CI is now complete (in record time!) showing:
```
1 pending, 32 neutral, and 18 successful checks 
```
The "neutral" tasks are shown with a grey bullet instead of yellow (in progress) or green (passed). The tasks skipped are the ones I expected. The only one I'm not sure about is the `alt_build` one. I thought it should probably be skipped, but then I saw `Build Each Commit` and am no longer sure.

To make this easier to review, I'm attaching a task map. Skipped tasks will show `SKIP: CI:DOCS` in the bottom.

![cirrus-map-ci_reenable_cidoc_skip](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/265639/95779425-499bd600-0c87-11eb-8c4e-1ad4f43e8ad9.png)

We also have #7998

I don't know which we should merge - I leave it to @cevich and @edsantiago to work out?
CI is @cevich territory so I'll defer to his.
